top_findings.summary: The research skill requests access to "Complete contact list and team members" and "Personal preferences and operating instructions" as part of loading the full PAI context. These sensitive personal data elements are unrelated to conducting research on external topics. While the skill's stated purpose is information gathering about external subjects, it requests access to the user's personal contacts, preferences, and team relationships which have no functional relationship to web research or information synthesis.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The research skill requests access to "Complete contact list and team members" and "Personal preferences and operating instructions" as part of loading the full PAI context. These sensitive personal data elements are unrelated to conducting research on external topics. While the skill's stated purpose is information gathering about external subjects, it requests access to the user's personal contacts, preferences, and team relationships which have no functional relationship to web research or information synthesis.
